nasb.text: Again, she gave birth to his brother Abel. And Abel was a keeper of flocks, but Cain was a tiller of the ground.

esv.text: And again, she bore his brother Abel. Now Abel was a keeper of sheep, and Cain a worker of the ground.

cnv.text: 她又生了該隱的弟弟亞伯。亞伯是牧羊的，該隱是種地的。

ccb.text: 后来，夏娃又生了该隐的弟弟亚伯。长大后，亚伯做了牧羊人，该隐做了农夫。

csbs.text: 后来，她又生了该隐的弟弟亚伯。亚伯是牧羊的，该隐是种地的。
